name: Feta-Herb Ladolemono

ingredients.item: cup (80 ml) strained fresh lemon juice
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Whisk together the lemon juice, feta, oregano, and garlic, if using, in a medium bowl. While whisking, drizzle in the olive oil in a slow, steady stream and whisk until smooth and creamy.
Season to taste with salt and pepper.
